title: Addressing climate change with behavioral science: A global intervention tournament in 63 countries

tax_mentions.exact_term_used_in_paper: I support raising carbon taxes on gas/fossil fuels/coal
tax_mentions.context: Example item in the nine-item climate policy support scale.
tax_mentions.notes: Only part of a composite index.

excluded_policy_mentions.exact_term_used_in_paper: support for climate change mitigation policy
excluded_policy_mentions.reason_it_is_not_a_carbon_or_fuel_tax: Broad policy-support outcome; tax-specific effects are not isolated.

inclusion_reason: Includes an explicit carbon-tax item, but only inside a broader climate policy-support index.
exclusion_reason: Carbon tax appears only as one item in a nine-item composite; the paper does not analyze tax-specific support separately.
